extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
2cf41652-1d3b-4f89-93b0-dc4a72ad0b7a.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
2cf41652-1d3b-4f89-93b0-dc4a72ad0b7a.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
2cf41652-1d3b-4f89-93b0-dc4a72ad0b7a.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
2cf41652-1d3b-4f89-93b0-dc4a72ad0b7a.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
6edf8ee0-ba07-4044-8b18-8fc38ec00e22.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
6edf8ee0-ba07-4044-8b18-8fc38ec00e22.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
6edf8ee0-ba07-4044-8b18-8fc38ec00e22.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
6edf8ee0-ba07-4044-8b18-8fc38ec00e22.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
ed2adb3a-84f9-4e3a-97e8-b72744c0271e.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
ed2adb3a-84f9-4e3a-97e8-b72744c0271e.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
ed2adb3a-84f9-4e3a-97e8-b72744c0271e.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
ed2adb3a-84f9-4e3a-97e8-b72744c0271e.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
ed2adb3a-84f9-4e3a-97e8-b72744c0271e.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

caveats.detail: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

1464317c-f5ea-43f6-afb1-b575c70985df.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
1464317c-f5ea-43f6-afb1-b575c70985df.label: counterfactual
1464317c-f5ea-43f6-afb1-b575c70985df.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
1464317c-f5ea-43f6-afb1-b575c70985df.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
1464317c-f5ea-43f6-afb1-b575c70985df.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
1464317c-f5ea-43f6-afb1-b575c70985df.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

caveats.detail: Proxy selection may dominate the result.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Macro releases require explicit publication-lag handling.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

43b5cf98-df5a-4823-bfe5-1a94fd192240.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
43b5cf98-df5a-4823-bfe5-1a94fd192240.label: primary
43b5cf98-df5a-4823-bfe5-1a94fd192240.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
43b5cf98-df5a-4823-bfe5-1a94fd192240.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
43b5cf98-df5a-4823-bfe5-1a94fd192240.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
43b5cf98-df5a-4823-bfe5-1a94fd192240.title: Primary macro transmission

caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

53e82ad6-e1f9-400a-9ef5-60c6f4679ef7.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
53e82ad6-e1f9-400a-9ef5-60c6f4679ef7.label: regime
53e82ad6-e1f9-400a-9ef5-60c6f4679ef7.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
53e82ad6-e1f9-400a-9ef5-60c6f4679ef7.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
53e82ad6-e1f9-400a-9ef5-60c6f4679ef7.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
53e82ad6-e1f9-400a-9ef5-60c6f4679ef7.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
